title: Human metagenomics protocols Payami lab
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"a30vb","text":"This is a collection of protocols that details the entire process of conducting a human microbiome study from start to end. It includes (1) consent form, to enroll subjects with permission to store and share data (2) data collection protocols designed to be self-administered by subjects (Environmental \u0026 Family History Questionnaire, Gut Microbiome Questionnaire, instructions for saliva collection, and instructions for stool collection), (3) codes for bioinformatics and statistical data analysis, (4) workflow at a glance created according to STORM guidelines and (5) final product, the manuscript, which describes the whole process from start to end using metagenomics of Parkinson’s disease implicates the gut microbiome in multiple disease mechanisms.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Haydeh Payami
